market.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
market.rules_primary: If Jannik Sinner wins the 2026 Wimbledon Men's Singles professional tennis tournament, then the market resolves to Yes.
market.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the 2026 Wimbledon Men's Singles professional tennis tournament. If the participant forfeits, withdraws from consideration, or takes any official action that removes them from being able to win the 2026 Wimbledon Men's Singles professional tennis tournament, the market will resolve No for that participant.
market.title: Will Jannik Sinner win the Wimbledon Men's Singles?
